title: Dispatcher Assign View — Route Ordering Within Driver Column
description: Allow dispatcher to reorder jobs within a driver column by dragging. Order represents the route sequence for that driver's day. Order is persisted to backend via a sortOrder field.
acceptanceCriteria: Jobs within a driver column can be dragged up and down to reorder
Visual indicator shows drop position between jobs while dragging
On drop, new order is saved to backend via PATCH /api/jobs/:id with sortOrder field
Jobs are displayed in sortOrder ascending within each driver column
Dragging between driver columns still works — assigns job to new driver
Dragging to unassigned pool still works — clears assignedDriverId
implementationNotes: Add sortOrder Int field to Job model in schema.prisma, default 0, run migration
Use @dnd-kit/sortable (already in dnd-kit ecosystem) for within-column reordering
SortableContext wraps jobs within each DriverColumn
onDragEnd must distinguish between cross-column drag (assign) and within-column drag (reorder)
PATCH /api/jobs/:id already accepts partial updates — sortOrder can be sent as part of existing endpoint
Do not rewrite existing drag-and-drop between columns — extend only
